title: Overdue student payments above limit
description: The share of overdue student invoices exceeds policy.
recommended_next_check: Review student receivables by aging and department.

title: Negative or low cash flow
description: Net cash flow is at or below the configured minimum.
evidence: Net cash flow is $-350,000; ending cash is $1,380,000.
recommended_next_check: Review operating, scholarship, and capital cash outflows.

title: Payroll exceeds revenue threshold
description: Payroll cost is above the configured maximum share of revenue.
evidence: Calculated payroll/revenue is 52.00% versus a 42.00% maximum.
recommended_next_check: Review payroll by department, overtime, benefits, and headcount.

title: Tuition collection below target
description: Student payment collections are below the configured minimum.
evidence: Collection rate is 85.00% from $1,237,082 paid against $1,455,391 due.
recommended_next_check: Inspect overdue invoices, aging buckets, and payment plans.

title: Negative or zero operating result
description: Operating expenses meet or exceed operating revenue.
evidence: Net operating result is $-192,500 on $2,021,376 of revenue.
recommended_next_check: Review revenue shortfalls and expense drivers by department.

title: Vendor payment exceeds review threshold
description: At least one vendor payment exceeds the configured review value.
evidence: Maximum payment is $74,500 versus a $50,000 threshold.
recommended_next_check: Inspect the underlying vendor invoice, approval, and duplicate checks.
